title: NATO’s ‘Trump Whisperer’ Faces Blowback Over Support for Iran War
summary_full: Critics say Mark Rutte, the alliance’s secretary general, has gone beyond his remit by openly supporting a war that does not directly involve Europe’s collective defense.
summary_public: Critics say Mark Rutte, the alliance’s secretary general, has gone beyond his remit by openly supporting a war that does not directly involve Europe’s collective defense.

IR.label: negative
